Typedef Documentation

◆ dma_request_source_t

typedef enum _dma_request_source dma_request_source_t

Enumeration for the DMA hardware request.

Defines the enumeration for the DMA hardware request collections.

Enumeration Type Documentation

◆ _dma_request_source

enum _dma_request_source

Enumeration for the DMA hardware request.

Defines the enumeration for the DMA hardware request collections.

Enumerator
kDmaRequestDisabled 

Disabled.

kDmaRequestWUU0 

WUU0 Wake up event.

kDmaRequestReserved2 

Reserved.

kDmaRequestLPTMR0 

LPTMR0 Counter match event.

kDmaRequestLPTMR1 

LPTMR1 Counter match event.

TPM0 Channel 1 request.

TPM2 Channel 1 request.

Reserved.

kDmaRequestReserved17 

Reserved.

kDmaRequestLPI2C0Tx
